name: ECAA-workflow
description: Deterministic, offline compiler that turns a natural-language bioinformatics project description into a self-contained, agent-executable RO-Crate package. Wraps the compiler with a full-lifecycle conversational shell (closed LLM tool vocabulary, deterministic state machine) so domain scientists drive intake, blocker resolution, result review, rerun/amendment, and session branching entirely through chat. Conformance is enforced by an embedded ECAA validator over claims, evidence, and decision substrate.
